scripts.db:generate: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');if(!fs.existsSync('prisma/schema.prisma')){console.log('[bootstrap] skipped db:generate because prisma/schema.prisma is missing');process.exit(0)}cp.execSync('prisma generate',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');if(!fs.existsSync('prisma/schema.prisma')){console.log('[bootstrap] skipped db:migrate because prisma/schema.prisma is missing');process.exit(0)}cp.execSync('prisma migrate dev',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.db:seed: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');if(!fs.existsSync('prisma/seed.ts')){console.log('[bootstrap] skipped db:seed because prisma/seed.ts is missing');process.exit(0)}cp.execSync('tsx prisma/seed.ts',{stdio:'inherit'})"
